__NOTOC__
'''Garena Team''' is a professional gaming team based in Southeast Asia and is participating in [[All-Star Shanghai 2013]]. 

All the members of the team were voted by fans during April 2013.<ref>[http://lol.garena.tw/events/20130411_AllStar/index.php SEA All-Star Voting]''garena.tw''</ref>
